parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, task_name: $('Post-Procesado').first().json.task_name, success: $('Post-Procesado').first().json.success, exit_code: $('Post-Procesado').first().json.exit_code, output_preview: ($('Post-Procesado').first().json.output || '').slice(0, 500), duration: $('Post-Procesado').first().json.duration_seconds, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
